items.name: Hawaiian Style Poke
items.description: Cubed fresh tuna and salmon, sliced onions tossed with sesame oil, soy sauce, red pepper flakes and green onions. Served with homemade taro chips.

items.name: BBQ Pork
items.description: Chef Marco's homemade BBQ Pork, Chinese Style served with BBQ sauce and hot mustard.

items.name: Gyoza Yaki
items.description: Tender crisp cabbage and pork dumplings, spiked with ginger, soy sauce & Mirin. Served with a chili oil and Shoyu Dipping sauce.

items.name: Robata (grilled skewers)
items.description: Tender pieces of sirloin marinated in shoyu, brown sugar, and pineapple juice.

items.name: Tacos (Fish or Kalua Pork)
items.description: Two tasty tacos filled with lightly fried Panko dusted seasonal fresh fish, or our homemade Kalua pork served in a grilled flour tortilla with homemade pico de gallo.

items.name: Agedashi Tofu
items.description: Lightly breaded tofu served with bonito flakes and tempura sauce.

items.name: Spicy Fried Rice
items.description: White rice fried with Portuguese sausage, peas, eggs, carrots, green onion, Sambal chili sauce, and BBQ Pork. ( Add fried egg for $1.50) Add bacon Bits

items.name: Oh So Ono Coconut Prawns
items.description: 4 Prawns, citrus marinated then dusted with sweet coconut flake & fried. Served with a Sweet Chili Sauce.

items.name: Ohana Sliders (Kalua or Spam)
items.description: Your choice of homemade Kalua pork, or grilled spam on dinner rolls. Served with spicy coleslaw and a pesto mayo sauce, with fries.

items.name: Spam Musubi
items.description: Grilled slices of original recipe SPAM on top of blocks of rice & wrapped with nori, lightly drizzled with an oyster plum sauce. (Add tamago (egg) for $2.00)

items.name: Tempura Sampler
items.description: 3 Traditional Japanese Tempura Prawns & Assorted vegetables. Served with Tempura Sauce.

items.name: Lumpia Shanghai
items.description: Thin crisp Filipino-style egg rolls filled with shrimp and pork. Served with sweet chili dipping sauce.

items.name: Veggie Spring Rolls
items.description: 2 Rice Flour wraps filled with Somen noodles, carrots, cilantro, and lettuce. Served with a Thai Peanut Sauce.

items.name: Loco Moco
items.description: Da Braddah's favorite! A grilled beef patty topped with 2 fried eggs over rice, smothered with brown gravy & grilled onions. Served with potato/mac salad. Customize to your taste with fried rice, kalua pork, chicken katsu, spam, and bacon.

items.name: Big Kahuna Fish & Chips
items.description: 4 tender pieces of line caught true cod, Panko battered & fried. Served over fries with our homemade tartar sauce & spicy coleslaw.

items.name: Ginger Chicken Broccoli
items.description: Strips of chicken stir fried with broccoli, onions, carrots and bell peppers in a ginger oyster sauce. Served with steamed rice.

items.name: Kalua Pork
items.description: Hawaiian style roasted pork served with cabbage and rice & mac/potato salad.

items.name: Curry Rice
items.description: Rich pork curry stew with onion, green peppers, celery, potatoes, and carrots. Served with pickled radish. Make it a Katsu Curry rice with chicken Katsu

items.name: Kalua Pork Sandwich
items.description: Slow roasted lu’au style pork served with shredded cabbage and crispy fries or mini salad.

items.name: Island Style Baby Back Ribs
items.description: Ribs rubbed with aromatic spices, grilled then brushed with a spicy tropical fruit BBQ sauce, and served with steamed rice.

items.name: Adobo
items.description: Chicken drumettes slowly braised with garlic bay leaves, shoyu, coconut milk, and then grilled with a caramelized crust, served with steamed rice.

items.name: Chicken Katsu
items.description: Tender fillets lightly battered then coated in Panko breadcrumbs and fried to a crisp. Served with rice and Spicy Coleslaw.

items.name: Ohana Cheeseburger
items.description: 1/3 pound lean handmade beef patty, pesto mayo, pineapple, and grilled onions. Served with crispy fries. (Add Bacon $3.50)

items.name: Yakisoba
items.description: Fresh vegetables, tofu, and soba noodles sautéed in a homemade Yakisoba sauce. Your choice of Tofu or Chicken

items.name: Ohana Bento Box
items.description: Served with Miso soup, rice, coleslaw, pickled radish, and Wakame salad

items.name: Shogun
items.description: Chicken Katsu with your choice or chicken or beef teriyaki

items.name: Sumo
items.description: Chicken Katsu & salmon teriyaki with your choice of chicken or beef teriyaki.

categories.name: Yosh's Teriyaki Ohana
categories.note: All Teriyaki Entrees come with miso soup, rice and broccoli.

items.name: Edamame
items.description: Boiled soybeans lightly seasoned with kosher salt

items.name: Nabeyaki Udon
items.description: Udon noodles served traditional style with shitake mushrooms, spinach, fishcake, bbq pork, egg in a seafood broth. Served with a tempura prawn.

items.name: Ohana Salad
items.description: Seasonal house lettuce blend, tossed in a miso peanut butter vinaigrette, topped with roasted peppers & rice crackers. (add chicken or salmon)

items.name: Banana Cream Pie
items.description: Ohana’s own version of banana cream pie, Oreo cookie crust, fresh banana’s, vanilla pudding and whipped cream. Whole pies are available with 48-hour notice.

items.name: Chocolate Molten Lava Cake
items.description: Rich chocolate pudding in a dark chocolate cake, served with a scoop of vanilla ice cream.

items.name: Ice Cream
items.description: Locally made ice cream and sorbet. Your choice of Toasted Coconut and Vanilla. Green Tea and Rocky Road available in Issaquah.

items.name: Pele's Ice Cream
items.description: Your choice of any of our ice cream flavors, wrapped in pound cake and tempura fried to a crisp.

items.name: Seaweed Salad
items.description: wakame tossed with sesame oil and sesame seed.

items.name: Hamachi Jalapeno
items.description: sliced yellowtail on white onions topped with a citrus yuzu sauce, jalapenos and masago

items.name: Ohana Tuna Poke
items.description: Diced tuna and veggies mixed with a spicy shoyu sauce.

items.description: takuan (pickled radish) wrapped in nori and sushi rice

items.name: Tuna or Salmon Roll (Tekka or Sake Maki)
items.description: Fresh cut fish sliced and wrapped in nori and sushi rice.

items.name: Veggie Roll
items.description: Yamagobo (pickled carrot), Kaiware (radish sprouts), avocado, cucumber, takuan (pickled radish) wrapped together in nori and sushi rice

items.name: California Roll
items.description: Krab, avocado and cucumber wrapped in sushi rice and nori, sprinkled with sesame seeds.

items.name: Belltown Roll
items.description: fresh salmon, cucumber and avocado wrapped in sushi rice and nori and topped with masago (smelt roe).

items.name: Creamy Crunchy Salmon
items.description: fresh salmon, cream cheese, spicy mayo and crunchy tempura flakes

items.name: Spicy Tuna Roll
items.description: Our Spicy tuna mixture, cucumber and kaiware (radish sprouts) wrapped in nori and sushi rice

items.name: Spicy Salmon Roll
items.description: fresh sliced salmon with spicy mayo, cucumber and kaiware (radish sprouts) wrapped in nori and sushi rice

items.name: Aloha Roll
items.description: Krab, scallops, avocado wrapped in sushi rice and nori and topped with masago (smelt roe)

items.name: Salmon Skin
items.description: Crispy fried salmon skin, cucumber, yamagobo (burdock root), and kaiware wrapped in nori and sushi rice

items.name: Da Kine Roll
items.description: Tempura shrimp and avocado wrapped in sushi rice and nori and topped with eel sauce.

items.name: Eel Roll
items.description: Baked eel, cucumber, avocado wrapped in nori and sushi rice and topped with eel sauce.

items.name: Chizuko Roll
items.description: Tempura shrimp, cucumber, avocado, kaiware (radish sprouts), and masago (smelt roe) wrapped in nori and sushi rice

items.name: King & I Roll
items.description: Fresh salmon, avocado, eel, krab, cream cheese, crunchies wrapped in thinly sliced cucumber and topped with eel sauce

items.name: Spider Roll
items.description: fried soft shell crab, cucumber, avocado, kaiware and masago wrapped in nori and sushi rice

items.name: Super Crunchy Roll
items.description: your choice of spicy tuna or spicy salmon with tempura flakes wrapped in sushi rice and nori and topped with prawns

items.name: Sakura Roll
items.description: Yellowtail, cilantro, jalapeno, kaiware and onion wrapped in sushi rice and nori and topped with albacore, avocado and tobiko (Flying Fish roe)

items.name: Crunchy Dynamite
items.description: Shrimp tempura and krab rolled in sushi rice, nori, egg and coconut flakes then fried crispy brown. Topped with a honey mayo sauce

items.name: Dragon Roll
items.description: our California roll topped with eel

items.name: Rainbow Roll
items.description: California topped with an assortment of fish

items.name: Firecracker Roll
items.description: krab, tuna, salmon, avocado, cream cheese and tobiko wrapped in nori and sushi rice, fried in tempura batter and served with a spicy peanut sauce and spicy mayo on the side. (15 min. Prep Time)

items.name: Half Baked
items.description: California roll topped with assorted baked fish mixed with spicy mayo, eel sauce and green onions. (15 min. Prep time)

items.description: 8 pieces of chef’s choice assorted sushi and your choice of a California roll or Belltown roll

items.name: Blue Hawaiian
items.description: Rum, Pineapple juice, sour mix and Blue Curacao served over ice. “ A Hawaiian Classic”

items.name: Big Island Ice Tea
items.description: Vodka, House Gin, Rum, Triple Sec, Pass-O-Guava juice and lemon-lime soda and a dash of mango puree served over ice. “An Ohana twist on the classic Long Island!”

items.name: Mala Shake
items.description: Coconut Rum and White Rum, Strawberry and Mango puree, fresh banana, pineapple juice, coconut milk and Pass-O- guava juice blended together. “Ohana’s tribute to Yosh’s dog Mala, thanks for guarding the door.”

items.description: Peach vodka, Triple Sec, Lychee juice, lime juice, sour mix and coconut milk blended smooth.

items.name: Mango Madness
items.description: Vodka, Pineapple juice, coconut milk and mango puree, blended to perfection.

items.description: White Rum, Grenadine, Pineapple juice, orange juice and amaretto with a float of Dark rum

items.name: Lychee Martini
items.description: Vodka, Lychee juice and lime juice shaken and served in a chilled martini glass.

items.name: Lava Flow
items.description: White Rum, pineapple juice and coconut milk, blended smooth and swirled with strawberry puree. “Pele would be pleased”

items.name: Strawberry Guava Martini
items.description: Vodka, Triple Sec, Strawberry Puree and Pass-o-Guava juice, shaken and served up.

items.name: Molokai Mule
items.description: Choose between vodka, whiskey or spiced rum served with lime juice and ginger beer

items.name: Toshiro Old Fashion
items.description: Iichiko Shochu, simple syrup and a dash of bitters over ice.
